no: Deities of Faerun by Raduziel. 53 deity-specific cleric kits (1 per deity) with unique abilities, weapon restrictions, and NPC assignments. CAN coexist with F&P if DoF sphere system (cn:2) is NOT installed — kits work as standalone class options. Sphere system (cn:2) HARD CONFLICTS with F&P cn:80. 53 kit slots if all installed (significant kit cap impact). Not .

conflicts.reason: cdtweaks weapon style and proficiency changes clash with Deities of Faerun's proficiency system
conflicts.theirComps: #2060 Weapon Styles for All #2160 #2161 #2162 #2163 #2164 Weapon Proficiency

conflicts.reason: Both implement sphere systems for divine casters. Mutually exclusive sphere assignments.
Reported incompatible by LCC-docs database (lcc id 297 vs 314)
Reported incompatible by LCC-docs database (lcc id 297 vs 982)

sum: 53 deity-specific cleric kits with unique abilities, weapon restrictions, and 25 NPC assignments. Optional sphere system and stronghold alterations.

co.no: Core system. Removes base cleric weapon restrictions, re-applies per deity. REQUIRED for all kits and NPC assignments. No conflicts with F&P if sphere system (cn:2) is not installed — kits work standalone.
co.tp2n: Base Cleric Changes (required for all components)

co.no: Cosmetic: assigns deity-themed colors to kit avatars. Requires core (cn:0). Purely visual.

PnP sphere-based spell access for deity kits. HARD CONFLICT with Faiths & Powers sphere system (cn:80). Both rewrite divine spell tables. Choose one: DoF spheres OR F&P spheres. F&P is more comprehensive and . DoF kits work without this component.
Heartwarder of Sune — love/beauty/passion. Charisma bonuses, charm abilities. Also in Divine Remix. Adds 1 kit slot.
Battleguard of Tempus — war/strategy. Combat bonuses, rage abilities. Also in Divine Remix. Adds 1 kit slot.
Strifeleader of Cyric — strife/murder/deception. Backstab, poison, illusion. Also in Divine Remix. Adds 1 kit slot.
Nightcloak of Shar — darkness/loss/secrets. Stealth, shadow magic. Also in Divine Remix. Adds 1 kit slot.
Alaghor of Clangeddin — dwarven battle god. Axe/hammer focus, dwarf-only. Also in Divine Remix and Yeslick NPC. Adds 1 kit slot.
Hoodwinker of Baravar — gnomish trickster god. Illusion, thieving abilities. Gnome-only. Adds 1 kit slot.
Fastpaw of Baervan — gnomish nature god. Animal companion, nature magic. Gnome-only. Adds 1 kit slot.
Watcher of Helm — guardian/protection god. Defense bonuses, vigilance abilities. Adds 1 kit slot.
Stormcaller of Talos — storms/destruction. Lightning, weather magic. Adds 1 kit slot.
Dawnbringer of Lathander — dawn/renewal/creativity. Healing, undead turning, light magic. Adds 1 kit slot.
Holy Justice of Tyr — justice/law. Detect evil, smite, lawful abilities. Adds 1 kit slot.
co.tp2n: Install kit: Holy Justice of Tyr

co.no: Lorekeeper of Oghma — knowledge/inspiration. Lore bonuses, identification. Also in Divine Remix. Adds 1 kit slot.
Painbearer of Ilmater — suffering/endurance/martyrdom. Damage absorption, healing. Also in Divine Remix. Adds 1 kit slot.
Dweomerkeeper of Mystra — magic/spellcraft. Bonus spells, spell resistance. Adds 1 kit slot.
Holy Champion of Torm — duty/loyalty/obedience. Paladin-like abilities for clerics. Adds 1 kit slot.
co.tp2n: Install kit: Holy Champion of Torm

co.no: Silentwalker of Mask — shadows/thievery. Stealth, lockpicking, trap detection. Adds 1 kit slot.
Icevassal of Auril — cold/winter. Frost magic, cold resistance. Adds 1 kit slot.
Talon of Malar — hunting/stalking/bloodlust. Tracking, animal summoning, rage. Adds 1 kit slot.
Waveservant of Umberlee — oceans/storms/drowning. Water magic, lightning. Adds 1 kit slot.
Silverstar of Selune — moon/stars/navigation. Moonlight magic, lycanthropy protection. Also in Divine Remix. Adds 1 kit slot.
Malagent of Talona — disease/poison. Poison attacks, disease resistance. Adds 1 kit slot.
Pain of Loviatar — pain/torment. Self-harm for power, whip proficiency. Adds 1 kit slot.
Dreadruler of Bane — tyranny/oppression. Fear, domination, dark power. Adds 1 kit slot.
Deathstalker of Bhaal — death/murder. Assassination abilities, death magic. Adds 1 kit slot.
Gray One of Myrkul — death/decay/undead. Undead summoning, necromancy. Adds 1 kit slot.
co.tp2n: Install kit: Gray One of Myrkul

co.no: Doomguide of Kelemvor — death/judgment. Undead turning, protection from undead. Adds 1 kit slot.
Magistrati of Azuth — arcane magic/wizards. Arcane spell access for clerics. Adds 1 kit slot.
Doomscribe of Jergal — fatalism/record-keeping. Divination, fate magic. Adds 1 kit slot.
Holy Strategist of Red Knight — strategy/tactics. Combat planning, tactical abilities. Also in Divine Remix. Adds 1 kit slot.
co.tp2n: Install kit: Holy Strategist of The Red Knight

co.no: Bloodreaver of Garagos — war/slaughter. Berserker rage, blood magic. Adds 1 kit slot.
Seer of Savras — divination/prophecy. Far-seeing, detection abilities. Adds 1 kit slot.
Necrophant of Velsharoon — necromancy/undeath. Undead creation, lichdom aspiration. Adds 1 kit slot.
Mistcaller of Leira — illusion/deception. Illusion spells, mirror images. Adds 1 kit slot.
Luckbringer of Tymora — good fortune/adventuring. Luck bonuses, saving throw boosts. Adds 1 kit slot.
Black Finger of Beshaba — misfortune/bad luck. Curses, enemy debuffs. Adds 1 kit slot.
co.tp2n: Install kit: Black Finger of Beshaba

co.no: Doombringer of Hoar — revenge/retribution. Retaliatory damage, vengeance abilities. Adds 1 kit slot.
Windwalker of Shaundakul — travel/exploration/wind. Movement speed, wind magic. Adds 1 kit slot.
Wavetamer of Valkur — sailors/favorable winds. Water magic, navigation. Adds 1 kit slot.
Darkwalker of Ibrandul — darkness/caverns. Darkvision, underground combat bonuses. Adds 1 kit slot.
Pacifist of Eldath — peace/quiet/springs. Nonviolent approach, healing focus. Adds 1 kit slot.
Iceguardian of Ulutiu — glaciers/arctic survival. Cold resistance, ice magic. Adds 1 kit slot.
Woodwife of Shiallia — woodland/fertility. Plant magic, animal companion. Adds 1 kit slot.
Glyphscriber of Deneir — writing/cartography. Glyph magic, scroll crafting. Adds 1 kit slot.
Trailblazer of Marthammor — dwarven travel/exploration. Movement bonuses, dwarf-only. Adds 1 kit slot.
Hawkeye of Solonor — elven archery/hunting. Ranged bonuses, elf-only. Adds 1 kit slot.
Horn Guard of Yondalla — halfling protection/home. Defensive abilities, halfling-only. Adds 1 kit slot.
co.tp2n: Install kit: Horn Guard of Yondalla

co.no: Bloodstalker of Urdlen — gnomish evil/bloodlust. Burrowing, poison, gnome-only. Adds 1 kit slot.
Luckmaiden of Haela — dwarven luck/battle. Combat luck, dwarf-only. Adds 1 kit slot.
Truesword of Arvoreen — halfling defense/war. Martial abilities, halfling-only. Adds 1 kit slot.
Glitterbright of Garl — gnomish trickery/gems. Illusion, gem magic, gnome-only. Adds 1 kit slot.
Arachne of Lolth — drow spider goddess. Spider magic, poison, web. Adds 1 kit slot.
Eye of Gruumsh — orcish war god. Berserker rage, orcish abilities. Adds 1 kit slot.
Feywarden of Corellon — elven creator god. Swordplay, arcane power, elf-only. Also in Divine Remix. Adds 1 kit slot.
Sonnlinor of Moradin — dwarven creator god. Forge magic, dwarf-only. Adds 1 kit slot.

co.tp2n: Strongholds Alterings (by Kjeron) - Requires the respective kit component

co.no: Modifies cleric stronghold quests with deity-specific content and dialogue. Requires core (cn:0).

advisories.reason: Both add deity-specific priest changes. ToF's speciality priests may overlap with DoF deity kits.
advisories.theirComps: #40650 Revised speciality priests #50400 New priest gods
